module_sme_rollup.name: Core Accounting & Ledger
module_sme_rollup.description: Chart of accounts, journal entries, reconciliation, and period close foundation.

statements.text: Configure chart of accounts with account types, categories, and multi-dimensional coding for your business structure.
Post journal entries with automatic debit/credit balancing and reconcile sub-ledgers to general ledger monthly.
Lock periods and manage year-end close with retained earnings rollover and opening balance migration.
statements.rationale: Prevents retroactive changes; enables new fiscal year

statements.text: Manage period-close tasks with sub-ledger reconciliation, accrual posting, and sign-off workflow.
Create recurring and reversing journal entry templates to automate routine accruals and prepayments.
statements.rationale: Reduces manual effort and human error

module_sme_rollup.name: Receivables & Payables
module_sme_rollup.description: Customer invoicing, vendor bills, payments, and collections management.

statements.text: Maintain customer and vendor master data with billing address, tax ID, payment terms, and bank details.
Create and auto-generate invoices from sales orders with line items, taxes, discounts, and email delivery.
statements.rationale: Faster billing cycle and customer communication

statements.text: Record customer payments and allocate flexibly across invoices; process credit notes with audit trail.
statements.rationale: Accurate receivables tracking and dispute resolution

statements.text: Match supplier invoices to purchase orders and goods receipts; route bills through multi-level approval workflows.
statements.rationale: Prevents duplicate payment and enforces controls

statements.text: Schedule and execute payment runs with batch files in SEPA, ACH, and local formats; apply early-payment discounts.
statements.rationale: Efficient cash outflow and cost savings

statements.text: Set customer credit limits, monitor exposure, and execute automated dunning sequences via email and SMS.
statements.rationale: Reduces bad debt and improves collections

statements.text: Generate customer and vendor ageing reports, receivables statements, and payment forecasts for cash planning.
statements.rationale: Visibility into collection and payment timing

module_sme_rollup.name: Cash, Tax & Compliance
module_sme_rollup.description: Bank reconciliation, tax calculation, audit controls, and regulatory reporting.

statements.text: Import bank statements in OFX, CSV, MT940, and CAMT.053 formats; match transactions and reconcile variances.
statements.rationale: Accurate cash position and fraud detection

statements.text: Manage cash across multiple bank accounts in different currencies; track petty cash and report variances.
Configure tax codes and automatically calculate tax on sales and purchase transactions by jurisdiction.
Track input and output tax separately; generate tax audit reports with full calculation transparency.
statements.rationale: Supports tax return filing and audits

statements.text: Record immutable audit trail of all transactions, approvals, and field changes with user and timestamp.
Enforce multi-level approval workflows and segregation of duties; prevent incompatible role assignments.
Map general ledger accounts to XBRL taxonomy; validate and submit filings to ACRA with audit sign-off.

module_sme_rollup.name: Reporting & Analytics
module_sme_rollup.description: Financial statements, dashboards, forecasting, and performance analysis.

statements.text: Generate profit and loss, balance sheet, trial balance, and cash flow statements with period comparison.
Compare actual results against budget targets; display variance analysis on all financial reports.
Create and maintain annual operating budgets by account, department, cost center, and project.
Generate rolling 13-week and 12-month cashflow forecasts from receivables, payables, and payroll data.
Display role-based dashboards with KPIs, drill-down to transactions, and scheduled report delivery.
Consolidate financial reporting across multiple legal entities with elimination of inter-company transactions.

module_sme_rollup.name: Assets, Projects & Expenses
module_sme_rollup.description: Fixed assets, project accounting, expense management, and cost allocation.

statements.text: Maintain fixed-asset register with category, location, cost, and useful life; calculate depreciation automatically.
Capitalize asset acquisitions and record disposals with gain/loss calculation; track residual value.
statements.rationale: Correct asset accounting and tax treatment

statements.text: Capture timesheet entries as billable or non-billable; track project expenses and calculate work-in-progress.
Define cost centre hierarchies and allocate costs across departments and projects; generate profitability reports.
Capture multi-line expense reports with approval workflows; assign project codes and post to general ledger.
Integrate corporate card feeds and auto-match transactions to expense claims; track mileage and per-diem.
statements.rationale: Reduced manual entry and policy compliance

module_sme_rollup.name: Integration, Security & Access
module_sme_rollup.description: Data connectivity, user access control, security, and mobile capability.

statements.text: Import master data and opening balances from CSV or Excel; export reports to CSV, Excel, and PDF.
statements.rationale: Flexible data exchange with other systems

statements.text: Synchronize sales orders, customer master, and accounts receivable data with CRM and inventory systems.
statements.rationale: Single source of truth across business

statements.text: Import payroll journal entries and allocate by department and cost centre; reconcile clearing accounts.
statements.rationale: Accurate payroll posting and cost allocation

statements.text: Accept credit card and direct debit payments online; automatically match and reconcile to invoices.
Create individual user accounts with predefined roles; enforce segregation of duties and two-factor authentication.
Encrypt financial data at rest and in transit; log all record-level access with user identity and timestamp.
Access system via web browser and native mobile apps; approve invoices and authorize payments on mobile.

Platform & Data.narrative: This family ensures your finance system is accessible, secure, and connected to the rest of your business. Singapore SMEs must comply with PDPA data protection rules and need staff to access financial data safely from anywhere—especially in hybrid work environments. It matters when your accountant needs to approve an invoice from a client site, or when you're sending tax data to ACRA or your auditor.

Core Ledger & Close.narrative: This is the backbone of financial accounting—it records every transaction in double-entry format, generates your statutory accounts, and creates an auditable trail for regulators. Every Singapore SME needs this to file accurate financial statements with ACRA, claim tax deductions, and satisfy bank lending requirements. It matters during your monthly close when you need to reconcile accounts, and at year-end when you prepare your audited financials.

Revenue Cycle.narrative: This family handles customer invoicing, payment collection, and credit management—the lifeblood of cash flow. SMEs need to issue invoices quickly, track who owes money, and follow up on late payments to keep working capital healthy. It matters when a customer disputes an invoice, when you need to offer credit terms to win a deal, or when you're chasing overdue receivables to meet payroll.

Expense Cycle.narrative: This family captures supplier bills, employee expenses, and purchase orders—ensuring you pay the right amount to the right vendor on time and control spending. SMEs benefit from automating expense claims (no more lost receipts) and matching invoices to orders to catch billing errors early. It matters when your team submits travel claims, when you need to approve a large vendor invoice, or when you're tracking project costs to ensure profitability.

Treasury & Compliance.narrative: This family manages your bank accounts, tax obligations, and cash forecasting—critical for staying compliant and solvent. Singapore SMEs must calculate and file GST returns on time, reconcile bank statements monthly, and forecast cash to avoid running out of funds. It matters when you're preparing your GST F5 return, when you need to know if you can afford a new hire next month, or when you're managing payments in multiple currencies.

Planning & Analytics.narrative: This family lets you set budgets, compare actual performance, and spot trends in your financial data through dashboards and reports. SMEs use budgeting to plan growth and control costs, and dashboards to answer quick questions like 'Are we on track this quarter?' without waiting for the accountant. It matters when you're pitching to a bank for a loan (they want to see your forecast), or when you're deciding whether to hire or cut costs.
